Audio Interchange File Format 1.2: Given priority over MPEG 1/2 Audio Layer 3 fmt/134 due to rare clash condition. Requested by National Library of New Zealand.
Exchangeable Image File Format (Compressed) 2.2.1: Added .jpeg as extension. Requested by National Library of New Zealand.
Wordstar 2000 1: Added a 128-byte max offset. Requested by National Library of New Zealand.

Extensible Metadata Platform Format: Corrected part of signature relating to a single quote mark for which the hex encoding had been entered for percentage character instead. Reported by Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
Wavefront Material Template Library: Slightly extended wildcard offset between 'newmtl' declaration and first 'Ka'/'Kd'/'Ks' properties. Requested by Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints.
